messages.content: 通常情况下，如果供应商是在中国的，我们会把先通过顺丰把测量工具寄给他们，然后他们再自行分配给自己的工厂。英语怎么说
In general, if the supplier is located in China, we usually send the measuring tools to them through SF Express, and then they distribute them to their own factories.

If the vendor is located in China, we usually send the jig tools to them through SF Express, and then they distribute them to their own factories. You should submit the pics whiten the jig tools. 这是什么意思
如果供应商位于中国，我们通常会通过顺丰快递把夹具工具寄给他们，然后他们再分发给自己的工厂。你应该在夹具工具内提交图片。
你应该提交带有测量工具的图片供审批。英文怎么说
You should submit pictures of the measuring tools for approval.

Now that we have this information, per my other email, can we go in and look at all Open Pos in Nexus that should go through packaging confirmation for all in scope factories, and then have 2 sets of numbers;

1)	Exempt Pos summary by business unit and vendor (you already completed)
2)	Non Exempt Pos that should go through Pacd Confirmation (all Pos ex factory after July 24th that are for in scope vendors and business units minus the exempt Pos)
这是什么意思

根据我之前的电子邮件，我们现在可以查看Nexus中所有需要经过包装确认的开放采购订单，并得到两个补充的数字数据：

1) 按业务部门和供应商划分的豁免采购订单汇总（您已经完成了）
2) 需要进行包装确认的非豁免采购订单（所有适用供应商和业务部门的自2021年7月24日以后出厂的采购订单减去豁免采购订单）

Ok, I will arrange for shipping to below address today, and will let you know the tracking number if it send out. Thanks
 
什么意思，帮我优化一下

Okay, I will arrange for the shipment to the following address today. Once it is dispatched, I will provide you with the tracking number. Thank you. 

(注：因不涉及具体地址信息，请自行替换为正确地址)
i have sent you the test report just now as attached email. 是什么意思，帮我优化一下

I have just sent you the test report as an attachment to the email. Thank you. 

(注：这是对他人的回复，请根据具体上下文进行优化)
I have just sent you the test report as an attachment in the email. Thank you.
我已经把测试报告发给你了，附在电子邮件中。 帮我翻译这句话
I have already sent you the test report, which is attached to the email. Can you please help me with the translation of this sentence?
I have already sent you the test report, which is attached to the emai
我已经把测试报告发送给您了，附在电子邮件中。
